case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. DANIEL DAVID LAGUILLO BERNHEIMER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DANIEL DAVID LAGUILLO BERNHEIMER DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-14-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BERNHEIMER, DANIEL DAVID LAGUILLO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERNHEIMER, DANIEL DAVID LAGUILLO $2,145.05 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,250.05 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT BERNHEIMER, DANIEL DAVID LAGUILLO
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BERNHEIMER, DANIEL DAVID LAGUILLO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,142.05 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BERNHEIMER, DANIEL DAVID LAGUILLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
